item.title: TheAthleticFC: The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 3min Arsenal qualify for the Champions League semi-finals after a goalless draw
item.description:
The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 3min Arsenal qualify for the Champions League semi-finals after a goalless draw at home to Sporting CP.
It means Kai Havertz’s late winner in last week’s first leg is enough to settle the tie.
Mikel Arteta’s side will face Atletico Madrid in the last four. 12 3 49 4 mil
